DEFEND_CORRUPTED.title: Defend
STRIKE_CORRUPTED.title: Strike
CORRUPTING_STRIKE.title: Corrupting Strike
CORRUPTING_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add 1 [jitter][purple]Corruption[/purple][/jitter] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
CORRUPTION_CORRUPTED.title: Corruption
THECORRUPTED-DEFENSIVE_RITUAL.title: Defensive Ritual
DOOMSDAY_STRIKE.title: Doomsday Strike
DOOMSDAY_STRIKE.description:
Deal 1 damage for each stack of [jitter][pink]Doom[/pink][/jitter] on you.{InCombat:
(Deals {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage)|}
DOOMSDAY_DOOR.title: Doomsday Door
DOOMING_STRENGTH.title: Dooming Strength
DOOMING_STRENGTH.description:
At the start of each turn apply 1 [red]Strength[/red] for each 2 stacks of [jitter][pink]Doom[/pink][/jitter].
Remove this [red]Strength[/red] at the end of your turn.
THECORRUPTED-CORRUPTED_STRIKE.title: Corrupted Strike
THECORRUPTED-DOOMED_STRIKE.title: Doomed Strike
STATUS_QUO.title: Status Quo
STATUS_QUO.description: [gold]Status[/gold] cards will now count as [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] cards for all purposes.
HELLFIRE_BREATHING.title: Hellfire Breathing
HELLFIRE_BREATHING.description: Whenever you draw a [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] card, deal [purple]{HellfireBreathingPower:diff()}[/purple] damage to ALL enemies.
HELLS_GATE_OPEN.title: Hell's Gate Open
HELLS_GATE_OPEN.description: At the start of your turn, add 1 random [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] card into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
SAVED_BY_CORRUPTION.title: Saved by Corruption
SAVED_BY_CORRUPTION.description: Whenever a [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] card is drawn or [gold]Exhausted[/gold], gain {SavedByCorruptionPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
ENERGY_CIRCULATION.title: Mana Circulation
CAREFUL_PLANNING.title: Careful Planning
CAREFUL_PLANNING.description: Whenever you draw a [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] card, draw  {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
CORRUPTED_FORM.title: Corrupted Form
CORRUPTED_FORM.description:
Shuffle 2 random [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] cards into your draw pile.
Whenever you draw a [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter], gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [red]Strength[/red].
HELLFIRE_SHOCKWAVE.title: Hellfire Shockwave
HELLFIRE_SHOCKWAVE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
If you have any [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] in your [gold]Hand[/gold], deal the same damage again.
CORRUPTED_BLADE.title: Corrupted Blade
CORRUPTED_BLADE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
Add a [jitter][purple]Corruption[/purple][/jitter] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THECORRUPTED-CORRUPTED_MACE.title: Corrupted Mace
THECORRUPTED-CORRUPTED_MACE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
Add a [jitter][purple]Corruption[/purple][/jitter] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
[gold]Doomed {Doomed:diff()}[/gold](Deal {DamageDiff:diff()} damage and apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].)
HELLFIRE_PACT.title: Hellfire Pact
HELLFIRE_PACT.description: Whenever you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] card, draw 1 card.
DEMON_SWORD.title: Demon Sword
DEMON_SWORD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] all [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] and gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [red]Strength[/red] for each [gold]Exhausted[/gold] card.
CORRUPTED_BULLETS.title: Corrupted Bullets
CORRUPTED_BULLETS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] in your [gold]Hand[/gold].{InCombat:
(Deals {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage)|}
SHARE_THE_WEIGHT.title: Share The Weight
SHARE_THE_WEIGHT.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] all [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] cards in your hand.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
SOUL_REAP.title: Soul Reap
SOUL_REAP.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Heal HP equal to unblocked damage.
THECORRUPTED-ENERGY_STRIKE.title: Energy Strike
THECORRUPTED-ENERGY_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you have any [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] card in your hand, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}{Energy:energyIcons()}.
[gold]Doomed {Doomed:diff()}[/gold](Deal {DamageDiff:diff()} damage. Next turn gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.)
SURPRISE_ATTACK.title: Surprise Attack
COUNTER_BALANCING_STRIKE.title: Counter Balancing Strike
COUNTER_BALANCING_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw cards equal to the number of [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] and [gold]Status[/gold] cards in your hand.
CLEANSING_BLOCK.title: Cleansing Block
CLEANSING_BLOCK.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Remove {DoomPower:diff()} [jitter][pink]Doom[/pink][/jitter] from yourself.
Heal {Damage:diff()} HP.
THECORRUPTED-CORRUPTION_TO_ASHES.title: Corruption to Ashes
BLESSING_IN_DISGUISE.title: Blessing in Disguise
THECORRUPTED-DOOM_BARRIER.title: Doom Barrier
CORRUPTED_AMULET.title: Corrupted Amulet
CORRUPTED_AMULET.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Draw 1 card.
Shuffle a random [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] card into your draw pile.)
THECORRUPTED-CORRUPTED_ARMOR.title: Corrupted Armor
THECORRUPTED-CORRUPTED_ARMOR.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Shuffle 2 random Curse cards into your draw pile.
[gold]Corrupted {Corrupted:diff()}[/gold] (Gain {DamageDiff:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].)
CORRUPTED_SPELLBOOK.title: Corrupted Spellbook
CORRUPTED_SPELLBOOK.description:
Shuffle a random [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] card into your draw pile.
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Apply {DoomPower:diff()} [jitter][pink]Doom[/pink][/jitter] to yourself.
THECORRUPTED-HELLFIRE_BARRIER.title: Hellfire Barrier
THECORRUPTED-DOUBLE_SHIELD.title: Double Shield
THECORRUPTED-CORRUPTED_STEEL.title: Corrupted Steel
THECORRUPTED-FORBIDDEN_ALCHEMY.title: Forbidden Alchemy
NEOWS_MIGHT.title: Neow's Might'
NEOWS_MIGHT.description:
Draw 2 cards.
Reduce the cost of all cards in your hand by 1 this turn.
DRAIN_STRENGTH.title: Drain Strength
DRAIN_STRENGTH.description:
Exhaust all [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
All Enemîes loose 1 plus the number of Exhausted cards [red]Strength[/red].
GRUDGE.title: Grudge
GRUDGE.description:
Add a random [gold]Ritual[/gold] card into your hand.
It costs 0 this turn.
PARALLEL_WORLD.title: Parallel World
PARALLEL_WORLD.description: Copy all cards in your hand and shuffle them into your draw pile.
PREPARE_RITUAL.title: Prepare Ritual
PREPARE_RITUAL.description: Exhaust any number of non-[jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] cards, then add that many [jitter][purple]Corruption[/purple][/jitter] cards into your hand.
THECORRUPTED-HELLFIRE_CARD_WALL.title: Hellfire Card Wall
THECORRUPTED-RITUAL_OF_STRENGTH.title: Ritual of Strength
THECORRUPTED-SMOKE_SCREEN.title: Smoke Screen
CORRUPTED_ENERGY.title: Corrupted Energy
CORRUPTED_ENERGY.description:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
If you have any [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] card in your hand, gain 1 additional [gold]Energy[/gold].
CORRUPTED_MULTIPLICATION.title: Corrupted Multiplication
CORRUPTED_MULTIPLICATION.description:
Whenever you draw this card, add a copy of it into your hand.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] and add a [jitter][purple]Corruption[/purple][/jitter] card into your hand.
CLOAK_OF_CORRUPTION.title: Cloak of Corruption
CLOAK_OF_CORRUPTION.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If you have any [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] card in your hand, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
THECORRUPTED-SUMMON_ARMY.title: Summon Army
COMMAND_ARMY.title: Command Army
COMMAND_ARMY.description:
Deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} damage for each HP of your [gold]Corrupted Army[/gold].{InCombat:
(Deals {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage)|}
THECORRUPTED-RITUAL_OF_SUMMONING.title: Ritual of Summoning
THECORRUPTED-DOOMED_ARMY.title: Doomed Army
THECORRUPTED-CLEANSING_RITUAL.title: Cleansing Ritual
THECORRUPTED-DELAYED_SUMMONING.title: Delayed Summoning
DOOMING_STRIKE.title: Dooming Strike
DOOMING_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply [jitter][pink]Doom[/pink][/jitter] to yourself, equal to the half of damage dealt.
THECORRUPTED-SOUL_SPLITTER.title: Soul Splitter
